assignment

2026-03-04

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(AnnotationHub) # to fetch genomes, annotations, etc.
  library(ensembldb)     # to manipulate ensembl gene annotations
  library(GenomicRanges) # data structure for genomic ranges 
  library(epiwraps)      # visualization
})
ah <- AnnotationHub()
query_results_mouse <- query(ah, c("Mus Musculus", "EnsDb", "version 102", "GRCm38"))
query_results_mouse
## AnnotationHub with 1 record
## # snapshotDate(): 2025-10-29
## # names(): AH89211
## # $dataprovider: Ensembl
## # $species: Mus musculus
## # $rdataclass: EnsDb
## # $rdatadateadded: 2020-10-27
## # $title: Ensembl 102 EnsDb for Mus musculus
## # $description: Gene and protein annotations for Mus musculus based on Ensem...
## # $taxonomyid: 10090
## # $genome: GRCm38
## # $sourcetype: ensembl
## # $sourceurl: http://www.ensembl.org
## # $sourcesize: NA
## # $tags: c("102", "AHEnsDbs", "Annotation", "EnsDb", "Ensembl", "Gene",
## #   "Protein", "Transcript") 
## # retrieve record with 'object[["AH89211"]]'
mouse_EnsDb <- ah[["AH89211"]]
## loading from cache
mouse_EnsDb
## EnsDb for Ensembl:
## |Backend: SQLite
## |Db type: EnsDb
## |Type of Gene ID: Ensembl Gene ID
## |Supporting package: ensembldb
## |Db created by: ensembldb package from Bioconductor
## |script_version: 0.3.6
## |Creation time: Sun Dec 20 12:15:16 2020
## |ensembl_version: 102
## |ensembl_host: localhost
## |Organism: Mus musculus
## |taxonomy_id: 10090
## |genome_build: GRCm38
## |DBSCHEMAVERSION: 2.1
## | No. of genes: 56305.
## | No. of transcripts: 144778.
## |Protein data available.
query_results_mouse_dna <- query(ah, c("Mus Musculus", "dna_sm", "2bit", "GRCm38"))
query_results_mouse_dna$rdatadateadded
##  [1] "2015-12-28" "2015-12-29" "2016-05-03" "2016-08-15" "2016-11-03"
##  [6] "2017-04-24" "2017-04-25" "2017-06-07" "2017-08-28" "2017-10-27"
## [11] "2018-04-19" "2018-08-01" "2018-10-16" "2019-02-14" "2019-04-29"
## [16] "2019-10-29" "2020-04-27" "2020-10-26" "2020-10-27"
rev(query_results_mouse_dna$ah_id)[1]
## [1] "AH88477"
mouse_dnaseq <- ah[["AH88477"]]
## loading from cache
## require("rtracklayer")
mouse_dnaseq
## TwoBitFile object
## resource: C:\Users\noahc\AppData\Local/R/cache/R/AnnotationHub/146810981f33_95223
query_results_fly <- query(ah, c("Drosophila", "dna_sm", "2bit", "BDGP6"))
query_results_fly$rdatadateadded
##  [1] "2015-12-28" "2015-12-29" "2016-05-03" "2016-08-15" "2016-11-03"
##  [6] "2017-04-24" "2017-04-25" "2017-06-07" "2017-08-28" "2017-10-27"
## [11] "2018-04-19" "2018-08-01" "2018-10-16" "2019-02-14" "2019-04-29"

## [21] "2021-05-17" "2021-10-20" "2022-04-21" "2022-04-25"
rev(query_results_fly$ah_id)[1]
## [1] "AH106160"
fly_dnaseq <- ah[["AH106160"]]
## loading from cache
fly_dnaseq
## TwoBitFile object
## resource: C:\Users\noahc\AppData\Local/R/cache/R/AnnotationHub/14683ee9556a_112906
mouse_genes <- genes(mouse_EnsDb)
head(mouse_genes)
## GRanges object with 6 ranges and 9 metadata columns:
##                      seqnames          ranges strand |            gene_id
##                         <Rle>       <IRanges>  <Rle> |        <character>
##   ENSMUSG00000102693        1 3073253-3074322      + | ENSMUSG00000102693

##   ENSMUSG00000104017   ENSMUST00000192336       Gm37363     <NA>

##   seqinfo: 118 sequences (1 circular) from GRCm38 genome
mouse_pcg <- mouse_genes[mouse_genes$gene_biotype=="protein_coding"]
length(unique(mouse_pcg$gene_id))
## [1] 22287
length(unique(mouse_pcg$symbol))
## [1] 21964
mouse_Tx <- transcripts(mouse_EnsDb)
mouse_pct <- mouse_Tx[mouse_Tx$tx_biotype=="protein_coding"]
mouse_pct

# mcols(mouse_pct)
mouse_ex <- exons(mouse_EnsDb, columns = c("gene_id"))
head(mouse_ex)
